programmes.show_description: All or Nothing. A hunter from Louisiana meets a California surfer girl on a deserted island of the Philippines. With very little water to tap into, dehydration soon sets in. S2, Ep11
23 Days. A book-smart but inexperienced survivalist and a rock-climbing wilderness enthusiast take on the savannah of Namibia - but the harsh conditions quickly take a toll. S2, Ep12

Trinity Lutheran Church. The Salvage Dawgs take on an old church in Greencastle. They remove the windows, saving the large bell and executing an idea for a console. S7, Ep1
Esther Ludwig Mansion. The Salvage Dawgs go back to Pennsylvania to save what they can from an old mansion before it gets demolished. They salvage chandeliers and mantles. S7, Ep2
Every Ounce Counts. Shawn works overtime to cover for his exhausted crew. Kris is blindsided by the loss of his lead diver. Meanwhile, Emily jumps in to prevent a fuel spill. S7, Ep7
Closing The Gap. Winter winds force the captains to reassess risk and reward. Shawn's mega-barge extraction worsens, and Ken pushes the Myrtle to the limit on a five-day run. S7, Ep8
A wet plant disaster threatens the Dust Devils' potentially lucrative fine gold find. Plus, the Gold Timers desperately try to turn their season around. S5, Ep9
Southern Rocky Mountain Wolf. The Southern Rocky mountain wolf hasn't been seen since the '40s, but cattle attacks suggest it exists. Forrest treks into the Sierras to find out. S2, Ep8
Release the Beast. Frustrations mount as more ice forces the Time Bandit off their fishing grounds. Meanwhile, the crew of the Northwestern fight to stop their boat from capsizing. S8, Ep15

programmes.show_name: Deadliest Catch: Inside the Catch: Best Brawls
programmes.show_description: Takes a closer look at the feuds and short fuses that make up the best Deadliest Catch conflicts. On a crab boat, sometimes the only way to earn respect is to fight for it.
The Columbus Connection. Darrell visits the Atocha, a valuable shipwreck Cooper recorded 50 years ago. Experts send Darrell to an archive in Spain to hunt down an ancient manifest. S1, Ep3
Mysteries Of Bermuda Triangle. Josh Gates dives into the mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle. He goes to the ocean floor, the skies and space to explore its intriguing disappearances. S6, Ep10
Revealing The Triangle. To conclude his epic investigation, Josh Gates uses cutting-edge technology to investigate the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous shipwreck and lost flights. S6, Ep11
No Place Like Dome. The Raneys help a struggling Idaho family in a cliffside geodesic dome home. Misty builds an innovative garden greenhouse, while Matt finds a dangerous predator. S4, Ep11
Water You Waiting For? With water running critically low at their only wash dam, The Cheals work to restore a second agitator. Slim Pickings battle a bung wall breach. S7, Ep10
Glitch In The Matrix. In the race to meet a rainbow matrix order ahead of the Lightning Ridge Opal Festival, The Misfits bet everything on untested DIY contraptions. S7, Ep11
Winter's Curse. A huge tidal surge threatens Josh and Monte as they chase their bounty deep into an Arctic storm. Meanwhile, Wild Bill hopes to get his broken boat off the dock. S14, Ep10
Blackout. Captain Jake is hit with a ship-wide blackout, and Sean is hit with a mechanical break. Unable to fish, Keith hopes to recruit an unlikely person to save his business. S14, Ep11
Back To Mint Condition. The team tackle a lakeside camp, adding a new deck, wood exterior, and open layout. They must contend with summer heat and huge windows. S15, Ep8
Mountaintop Masterpiece. The guys head to Albertville, Alabama, to build a beautiful log cabin guest house high atop Sand Mountain. S15, Ep8
The Gold Devils move their multi-million-dollar operation in search of big gold. And, new team Vince, Bibi and Murray break ground on their dream lease. S8, Ep2
Forsaken. Sparks don't fly deep in the Panamanian jungle, an ex-cop and a self-described wild child clash over cuddling- before the challenge overwhelms one of them. S2, Ep13
Contamination. After a typhoon scatters debris through a Philippine forest, a stay-at-home mum and stubborn trucker combat sickness and no food to survive. S2, Ep14

Virginia Victorian Home. The Salvage Dawgs travel to Hot Springs to salvage a late Victorian-style home. They recover cabinets, sinks, and a round window. S7, Ep3
Wayne Lanes Bowling Alley. The Salvage Dawgs go to Wayne Lanes in Waynesboro to salvage bowling balls, bowling pins, bowling shoes and whatever else they can find in the alley. S7, Ep4
Innovate & Overcome. In a race against winter, Shawn extends his sluice to get more gold. As Kris battles a bed of quartz, George enjoys a season-ending dive with his son. S7, Ep9
King Of Nome. Desperate to be Nome's gold king, Shawn risks the Christine Rose in dangerous waters. Plus, Ken struggles to free the Myrtle from the harbour. S7, Ep10
The Gold Gypsies could be sitting on a fortune but must decide whether to take a huge gamble. A water shortage halts Shane and Russell's operations. S5, Ep10
The Dracula Monkey Of Borneo. In Indonesia, Forrest seeks the Millers Grizzled Langur, or Dracula monkey. When he hears of an illegal pet market, his search becomes a rescue mission. S2, Ep9
The Bitter, Bloody End. The fleet head back out on the perilous waters of the Bering Sea for the final stretch of a merciless opilio season. Will they all make it back safely? S8, Ep16
Dangerous Waters. Darrell finds the final piece to Cooper's code, but hiring a crew presents new danger as he discloses his secret mission. On the water, there's a big discovery. S1, Ep4
Digging Into D-Day. Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a huge German bunker complex buried for 75 years. S6, Ep12
All The Pretty Horses. The Raneys help a family with dreams of a horse rescue. Misty builds a multi-tier garden and duck pond, and Marty constructs a horse barn. S4, Ep12
Back In The Saddle. With a major setback in Misty's build, the Raneys race the clock in their rescue of a Texas homestead. Matt builds a hog trap for an additional food resource. S4, Ep13
Diesel Doozies. Drowning in a sea of overburden, The Blacklighters face off against each other as Mark's inexperience with the dozer proves too much for Paul. S7, Ep12
A Festival Of Opal. On the eve of the famous Lightning Ridge Opal Festival, The Misfits battle to treat 150kg of matrix opal, forcing Cody to cook up a miracle. S7, Ep13
Bad Blood. Accidents hit the decks. As winter rocks the fleet with huge swells and strong winds, the Bering Sea takes a brutal toll on a rookie. On the Wizard, mutiny is looming. S14, Ep12
Captain Conflict. Sig races to offload his tanks before losing half a million dollars in crab. Plus, tension between co-captains reaches breaking point in the Wizard's wheelhouse. S14, Ep13
Terror In Appalachia. Phil and Jess venture into the Great Smoky Mountains to investigate missing hiker reports and sightings of grotesque human-like creatures. S3, Ep1
Butch Cassidy's Lost Loot. Josh Gates delves into Wild West lore to find Butch Cassidy's missing money. He traces the iconic outlaw's footsteps through Colorado, Utah and Nevada. S4, Ep4
The Ferals are on the gold when a four-wheeler crash leaves them man down. Plus, the Poseidon Crew battle to overcome a catastrophic mechanical failure. S8, Ep3
